form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 9 at Pontefract September 25 over 2000m, 6 len behind Wave Rider with 58.5kg at $9.50. Previously first up; fifth of 8 at Musselburgh April 2 2025 over 1600m, 10 len behind Zowal with 57.5kg at $4.50. Expecting a bold run while fresh.

Previously first up; fifth of 8 at Musselburgh April 2 2025 over 1600m, 10 len behind Zowal with 57.5kg at $4.50. Expecting a bold run while fresh.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 7th of 12 at Doncaster on March 29 over 2000m, 5 len behind Harvey carrying 56.5kg at $23. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at this track on April 26 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Good Morning Alex with 56kg at $9. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Second-up. First-up after five months 7th of 12 at Doncaster on March 29 over 2000m, 5 len behind Harvey carrying 56.5kg at $23. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at this track on April 26 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Good Morning Alex with 56kg at $9. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation when last of 12 at Newcastle All Weather November 27 over 1600m, 36 len behind Rainbow Nebula carrying 58.5kg at $21. Previously first up; 14th of 18 at Doncaster in the LR Gillies Fillies' Stakes November 8 over 2000m, on rain affected going; 25 len behind Danielle with 59kg at $41. Wait and see how she comes up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8.5). Resuming. Finished off last preparation when last of 12 at Newcastle All Weather November 27 over 1600m, 36 len behind Rainbow Nebula carrying 58.5kg at $21. Previously first up; 14th of 18 at Doncaster in the LR Gillies Fillies' Stakes November 8 over 2000m, on rain affected going; 25 len behind Danielle with 59kg at $41. Wait and see how she comes up.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 4th of 12 at Doncaster on March 29 over 2000m, 2 len behind Harvey with 55.5kg at $7. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at Gowran Park on July 26 over 1911m, 4 len behind Crypto Force with 62.5kg at $4.30. Fitter for that run and expected to be in the finish this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Second run back. First-up after six months 4th of 12 at Doncaster on March 29 over 2000m, 2 len behind Harvey with 55.5kg at $7. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at Gowran Park on July 26 over 1911m, 4 len behind Crypto Force with 62.5kg at $4.30. Fitter for that run and expected to be in the finish this time.

form.formComment: Resuming after a eight months break. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at Hamilton Park August 22 over 1800m, 0.8 len behind Seren Star carrying 59kg at $5. On debut second last of 10 at Lingfield All Weather April 1 2025 over 1600m, 14 len behind Mandana carrying 54.5kg at $17. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Resuming after a eight months break. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at Hamilton Park August 22 over 1800m, 0.8 len behind Seren Star carrying 59kg at $5. On debut second last of 10 at Lingfield All Weather April 1 2025 over 1600m, 14 len behind Mandana carrying 54.5kg at $17. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second last of 19 at York October 11 over 2060m, 25 len behind Let's Dream carrying 61kg at $7.50. First up last campaign second of 9 at this track April 17 over 2000m, 5 len behind Have Secret carrying 60kg at $7. Looks very hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Is first-up after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second last of 19 at York October 11 over 2060m, 25 len behind Let's Dream carrying 61kg at $7.50. First up last campaign second of 9 at this track April 17 over 2000m, 5 len behind Have Secret carrying 60kg at $7. Looks very hard to beat.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation third of 12 at Pontefract October 20 over 2000m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Tele Red with 61kg at $3. First up last campaign second of 12 at Redcar April 7 2025 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Classic Encounter with 59kg at $13. Among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. First up last campaign second of 12 at Redcar April 7 2025 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Classic Encounter with 59kg at $13. Among the chances.

form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 14 at Lingfield All Weather on April 3 over 2000m, 4 len behind Londoner with 56kg at $21. The run before that 4th in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 7 over 1900m, 2.75 len behind Way Of Life carrying 60.5kg at $8. No surprise if he turned things around.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after five months second last in a small field at Southwell All Weather on March 10 over 2200m, 11 len behind Caliban carrying 61kg at $6. Previously second-up 3rd of 8 at Chester on May 31 over 2100m, 5 len behind Topteam carrying 61kg at $6. Strips fitter and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign when last of 11 at Newcastle All Weather September 28 over 2000m, 13 len behind Per Contra carrying 57kg at $41. First up last campaign fifth of 9 at Pontefract April 14 over 2000m, 8 len behind King's Code carrying 53kg at $23. Later on perhaps.
